name: Neisseria meningitidis group a capsular polysaccharide diphtheria toxoid conjugate antigen
description: Neisseria meningitidis group a capsular polysaccharide diphtheria toxoid conjugate antigen is an active intramuscular immunization for the prophylaxis of invasive meningococcal disease caused by *Neisseria meningitidis* serogroup a. The vaccine contains *N. meningitis* serogroup a capsular polysaccharide antigens that are purified and individually conjugated to diphtheria toxoid protein that are extracted from Corynebacterium diphtheriae grown in another culture.
